checklist.paper_requirement: Format-specific character bigram generation with Laplace noise and recorded DP parameters.

gaps: Paper evaluates statistical distinguishers such as entropy, bigram likelihood, and discriminator models; this report only proves structural format fidelity and scanner recall.
checklist.paper_requirement: Evaluate generated honeytokens for format fidelity and statistical distinguishability.
Choose detector thresholds from held-out benign calibration scores at target alpha.
Report canary detector false positives and false negatives separately.
Insert canary credentials into model-visible context while binding them to a ledger.
Detect direct or encoded canary leakage in model outputs.

gaps: Provider egress guard blocks raw credential-shaped tool payloads, but DP-HONEY canary detection and NIMBUS-style leakage accounting are not yet applied to outbound serialized tool-call arguments before tool dispatch.
checklist.paper_requirement: Apply canary and leakage-accounting logic to serialized tool-call arguments before dispatch.
Produce audit evidence without copying raw production secrets or matched secret values.

missing_before_paper_faithful_plus: Paper evaluates statistical distinguishers such as entropy, bigram likelihood, and discriminator models; this report only proves structural format fidelity and scanner recall.

Provider egress guard blocks raw credential-shaped tool payloads, but DP-HONEY canary detection and NIMBUS-style leakage accounting are not yet applied to outbound serialized tool-call arguments before tool dispatch.
summary: DP-HONEY has DP-noised bigram provenance, split-conformal scanner calibration, held-out scanner FP/FN evidence, gateway substitution, canary leak detection, provider-egress blocking, and redacted audit evidence. It is still not paper-faithful+ because statistical distinguisher realism and tool-argument canary/leakage accounting remain incomplete.
